title: BudgetsConfig
description: config/budgets.json - performance + asset budgets measured against the target device (mid-tier Android). Human-edited (CLAUDE.md #6). glyphs.max_svg_bytes is enforced fail-fast by tools/bake_glyphs.py. Top-level additionalProperties is open because budget blocks are added as new surfaces earn a budget.

evolution.change: Initial machine-checkable formalization of config/budgets.json: device{cpu_throttle,network,profile}, glyphs{max_svg_bytes,note?}, targets{byte_cap,first_interaction_ms,fps,input_to_photon_ms}.
evolution.why: The frame/asset budgets must be schema-validated so a malformed ceiling fails fast at build (CLAUDE.md #6); glyphs.max_svg_bytes was added when the flags pack shipped (Row 8).
